data.title: Steak ’n Shake introduces Bitcoin bonus program for hourly staff, offering a BTC bonus per hour worked after two years.
data.description: The popular fast-food chain announced that their employees will be receiving a Bitcoin bonus for each hour worked, with the payouts becoming available after a two-year period. It is important to note that this bonus will only be applicable to company-operated locations.

data.title: UNITE HERE Local 11 files complaint against Flying Food Group for retaliation against airline catering workers reporting sexual harassment. City of Los Angeles urged to investigate.
data.description: In Los Angeles, UNITE HERE Local 11 and the University of California at Irvine’s Law and Organizing Clinic have submitted a complaint urging the City of Los Angeles Bureau of Contract Administration and Human Rights Department to conduct a comprehensive inquiry into Flying Food Group. The airline catering company, based at Los Angeles International Airport, is accused of retaliating against employees who raised concerns about sexual harassment and discrimination. This complaint highlights the need for a thorough investigation into the company's practices.

data.title: Inventor creates SWITCH UPS, interchangeable wall plates for easy decor changes. From Charlotte, N.C. - PITTSBURGH, Jan. 21, 2026.
data.description: In Pittsburgh on January 21, 2026, an inventor from Charlotte, North Carolina, shared about their creation, SWITCH UPS, which aims to simplify changing the appearance of wall plates seasonally. The inventor designed this product to address the inconvenience typically experienced during the installation of new wall plates. The invention presents a decorative and versatile solution for revamping wall plates effortlessly and frequently.

data.title: Rapid Care acquires DeepDoc to boost AI capabilities in medical record intelligence, enhancing healthcare decisions.
data.description: In a recent development on January 21, 2026, in Edgewater, Maryland, Rapid Care announced an acquisition that bolsters its AI strategy and propels advancements in swift and intelligent healthcare decision-making. Rapid Care, a company specializing in AI-powered healthcare technology, is poised to enhance its capabilities in navigating the intricate operational and financial aspects of the industry. This move signifies a significant step towards leveraging AI to revolutionize healthcare outcomes.

data.title: Vbrick named leader in Frost & Sullivan's global enterprise video platform market report for 2025, citing strong momentum in technology innovation and market execution.
data.description: Herndon, Virginia - Vbrick, a prominent enterprise video platform provider, was recently acknowledged as a frontrunner in the Frost Radar™: Enterprise Video Platforms, 2025. This recognition is based on evaluations of companies within the global enterprise video market, considering factors such as innovation and growth performance. The report by Frost & Sullivan focuses on entities showcasing significant advancement in technology innovation and market implementation. Vbrick's recognition underscores its leadership in delivering top-tier solutions within this rapidly evolving sector.

data.title: AI production suffers as GPU utilization drops below 50%, wasting billions in compute resources due to CPU-centric architectures.
data.description: A recent study found that artificial intelligence workloads are utilizing less than 50% of GPU capacity, primarily due to CPU-focused architectures. This inefficiency has resulted in billions of wasted compute resources.

data.title: Bitwarden strengthens Premium and Families plans with enhanced security features for early risk detection.
data.description: Bitwarden, a prominent provider in password and secrets management based in Santa Barbara, California, has unveiled major upgrades to its Premium and Families plans. These enhancements aim to offer improved protections to users, enabling them to detect potential risks in advance and prevent their accounts from being compromised. The updated plans signify a move away from traditional password management towards proactive identity security, focusing on addressing issues such as phishing attempts and the use of weak, reused, or exposed credentials.

data.title: Zèya Global Inc. secures $2.45M in funding led by Storage Innovations for swipe-based barter app in local commerce.
data.description: Zèya Global Inc., based in Miami, has successfully secured a funding round of $2.45 million, with Storage Innovations leading the investment. The company aims to expand its swipe-based barter app that is revolutionizing local commerce.

data.title: Telangana aims to be a top five life sciences cluster by 2030 with $25 billion investments, focusing on innovation and value creation.
data.description: Telangana aims to be one of the world's leading life sciences clusters by 2030, with a target of attracting $25 billion in investments. The government is redirecting its focus from traditional manufacturing to emphasize innovation and value creation. This announcement was made in Davos, Switzerland on January 21, 2026.

data.title: TON price to rebound to $2.00- $2.40 by February, currently at $1.54 with RSI at 37.77 signaling oversold conditions. Technical analysis indicates recovery.
data.description: Toncoin is currently trading at $1.54, with its Relative Strength Index (RSI) standing at 37.77, signaling oversold market conditions. Analysts predict a potential bounce back from the current support level, with technical analysis pointing towards a recovery ranging between $2.00 and $2.40.

data.title: US technology leaders plan to invest more in green chemistry for innovation; survey shows majority support.
data.description: In Palo Alto, California, a survey commissioned by the Gordon and Betty Moore Foundation revealed that a significant number of research and technology leaders in the U.S. are planning to increase investments in green chemistry. The study indicates that many companies aim to boost innovation, decrease expenses, and enhance their competitiveness through this approach. According to the research conducted by Morning Consult, a majority of industry professionals anticipate ramping up financial commitments towards green chemistry. The findings highlight a widespread belief in the long-term economic benefits associated with green chemistry, demonstrating a strong industry-wide support for this sustainable practice.

data.title: Norwood Financial (NASDAQ: NWFL) anticipates EPS of $0.85 for Q4 2026, investors await potential surpassing of estimates.
data.description: Norwood Financial (NASDAQ: NWFL) is scheduled to release its quarterly earnings report on Thursday, January 22, 2026. Analysts predict the company will post an earnings per share (EPS) of $0.85. Investors eagerly await this announcement, hoping for results that exceed expectations and positive guidance for the upcoming quarter. New investors should take note that this information is available on Benzinga.com for further details.
